positive: A maximalist celestial forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and stylized cosmic elements. The composition is centered and symmetrical, ideal for a repeating pattern or central apparel print. Dominant colors are deep midnight blues, emerald greens, and vibrant sapphire accents, highlighted by glowing gold and neon cyan light sources. The style is highly detailed digital illustration, combining Art Nouveau curves with modern synthwave geometry. Strong contrast and clean, sharp silhouettes are mandatory. Foreground elements include stylized crescent moons and swirling nebulae acting as foliage. High contrast edge lighting is crucial for a striking, pop-art aesthetic.
negative: text, watermark, logo, trademark, copyright, blur, grain, noise, jpeg artifacts, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, poorly rendered, multiple subjects, signature, bokeh
